allow_crm_write.description: If true, server may propose CRM sync actions, but must still require explicit confirmation.
allow_crm_write.title: Allow Crm Write

conversation_id.description: If provided, continues an existing conversation; otherwise server creates one.
conversation_id.title: Conversation Id

history.description: Optional recent chat history for stateless clients; server may ignore if it stores history.
history.title: History

examples: We have a D365 project for Japan retail.
message.title: Message

analysis_card.description: Optional analysis summary card for FE to render above suggestions.

extracted_opportunity.description: Best-effort structured extraction from user message.

suggested_actions.description: Client-facing next actions like 'save opportunity draft', 'push to CRM', etc.
suggested_actions.title: Suggested Actions

suggestions.description: Optional rich suggestion cards for FE (interactive UI).
suggestions.title: Suggestions

HubSpotDealCreateResponse.description: Result after accepting draft (HubSpot create is stubbed until integration).

hubspot_deal_id.description: HubSpot deal id when integration succeeds.
hubspot_deal_id.title: Hubspot Deal Id

HubSpotDealCreateResponse.title: HubSpotDealCreateResponse

HubSpotDealDraft.description: User-submitted deal draft from the in-chat form (case 2).

onsiteDeliveryTeam.description: At most 50 entries; each string trimmed by client.
onsiteDeliveryTeam.title: Onsitedeliveryteam

HubSpotDealDraft.title: HubSpotDealDraft

OpportunityAnalysisCard.description: Optional summary block above team cards (mirrors FE design).

footer_hint.description: Small hint text at the bottom of analysis card.
footer_hint.title: Footer Hint

tags.description: List of tags for quick scanning. Each tag has {label, tone}.
tags.title: Tags

OpportunityAnalysisCard.title: OpportunityAnalysisCard

extracted.description: Optional structured fields if already extracted client-side; server may re-evaluate.

OpportunityExtract.description: Example schema for parsing structured JSON from an LLM.
OpportunityExtract.title: OpportunityExtract

OpportunityExtracted.description: Structured attributes extracted from free text (LLM/tool assisted).
OpportunityExtracted.title: OpportunityExtracted

confirm.description: Must be true to execute CRM write.
confirm.title: Confirm

external_id.description: External id if sourced from an integration (e.g. HubSpot deal id).
external_id.title: External Id

TeamSuggestion.description: Rich suggestion card payload to render interactive UI on FE.

capability_tags.description: Styled capability/resource tags: each tag has {label, tone}.
capability_tags.title: Capability Tags

TeamSuggestion.title: TeamSuggestion

post.description: US1 entrypoint. Accepts a user message and optional short history; returns assistant answer plus matched units and structured extraction (best-effort).

schema.title: Response Ready Api V1 Health Ready Get

post.description: Accepts the same JSON shape as the frontend `DealDraft` (camelCase keys). HubSpot integration can be wired later; this endpoint validates shape and returns a stub id.
post.summary: Create HubSpot deal from form draft

get.description: US2: FE polls this endpoint; later can evolve to push/stream.
US6: returns a consolidated list; v1 can start with local DB only.

post.description: US5: persist an opportunity captured from chat or manual entry.

put.description: US5: requires explicit confirmation via request body.

get.description: Useful for FE dropdowns and admin screens.

schema.title: Response List Units Api V1 Units Get

put.description: US3: authenticated unit lead updates capability info; triggers re-embed later.
